Introduction
    Avonturen van Pietje Bell is a movie starring Jeu Consten, Thea Eyssen, and Cor van der Linden. Pietje (pronounced Peetch-ye) Bel is the well-known rascal of Rotterdam, who has a reputation of turning everything into a mess. After...
